junit-project/junit4-demo/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 17 to align with the target JDK version.
junit-project/junit4-demo/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 8 language features, which may fail at runtime on JDK 17 due to removed internal APIs or stricter module system enforcement, or simply fail to utilize Java 17 features if intended.

junit-project/junit4-demo/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 dependency with Mockito Core to update the testing framework stack.
Update Mockito Core version to a newer snapshot compatible with the new environment.
Add Mockito JUnit Jupiter integration dependency to support JUnit 5 testing with Mockito.
Update Lombok dependency to a newer version compatible with Java 17.

junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 test class inheritance with JUnit 5 annotations.
junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.why_exists: JUnit 4's TestCase class and its setUp/tearDown methods are not recognized by the JUnit 5 Jupiter engine, causing tests to be ignored or fail to execute.

junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 setUp method with JUnit 5 @BeforeEach annotation.
junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.why_exists: The @Override protected void setUp() method is specific to JUnit 3/4 TestCase and is ignored by JUnit 5, leading to missing initialization logic.

junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 tearDown method with JUnit 5 @AfterEach annotation.
junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.why_exists: The @Override protected void tearDown() method is specific to JUnit 3/4 TestCase and is ignored by JUnit 5, leading to missing cleanup logic.

junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.general_idea: Update imports from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 Jupiter API.
junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.why_exists: JUnit 4 classes (org.junit.Test, junit.framework.TestCase) are not available or compatible with the JUnit 5 Jupiter engine used in the new environment.

junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 lifecycle annotations with JUnit 5 equivalents to support the new test engine.
junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.why_exists: JUnit 4 annotations (@Before, @After, @BeforeClass, @AfterClass) are ignored by the JUnit 5 engine, causing lifecycle methods to not execute.

junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 lifecycle annotations with JUnit 5 equivalents to support the new test engine.
junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.why_exists: JUnit 4 annotations (@Before, @After, @BeforeClass, @AfterClass) are ignored by the JUnit 5 engine, causing lifecycle methods to not execute.

junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 lifecycle annotations with JUnit 5 equivalents to support the new test engine.
junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.why_exists: JUnit 4 annotations (@Before, @After, @BeforeClass, @AfterClass) are ignored by the JUnit 5 engine, causing lifecycle methods to not execute.

junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 lifecycle annotations with JUnit 5 equivalents to support the new test engine.
junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.why_exists: JUnit 4 annotations (@Before, @After, @BeforeClass, @AfterClass) are ignored by the JUnit 5 engine, causing lifecycle methods to not execute.

junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.general_idea: Update imports to use JUnit 5 API classes instead of JUnit 4.
junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.why_exists: JUnit 4 classes (org.junit.*) are not available or compatible with the JUnit 5 engine configuration in the target environment.

junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.general_idea: Update static assertion imports to use JUnit 5 API.
junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.why_exists: JUnit 4 assertion classes (org.junit.Assert) are not available or compatible with the JUnit 5 engine configuration in the target environment.

junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.general_idea: Migrate test class from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 by replacing the runner annotation with the extension annotation.
junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.why_exists: JUnit 4 runner classes are not recognized by the JUnit 5 platform; tests will fail to execute or be discovered without the JUnit 5 extension.

junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.general_idea: Update imports to use JUnit 5 API instead of JUnit 4 API.
junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.why_exists: JUnit 4 classes (org.junit.Test, org.junit.runner.RunWith, org.junit.Assert) are not part of the JUnit 5 API and will cause compilation errors if the JUnit 4 dependency is removed or if the code is intended to run on the JUnit 5 platform.

junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.general_idea: Update imports to use Mockito's JUnit 5 integration instead of JUnit 4 integration.
junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.why_exists: MockitoJUnitRunner is specific to JUnit 4; using it with JUnit 5 extensions causes runtime conflicts or failure to initialize mocks correctly.

junit-project/junit4-demo/src/test/java/.general_idea: Add Mockito strictness settings to configure mock behavior warnings.
